# @mongez/http

Robust native-fetch HTTP client for TypeScript. Returns `{data, error}` discriminated unions. Per-request `.cancel()`. Typed errors. Caching, retry, interceptors. `Resource` class for RESTful CRUD.

## Install

```
npm i @mongez/http
```

## Quick start

```ts
import { Http, setCurrentHttp, Resource } from '@mongez/http';

const http = new Http({
  baseURL: 'https://api.example.com',
  auth: () => `Bearer ${getToken()}`,
});
setCurrentHttp(http);

// Direct calls
const { data, error } = await http.get<User[]>('/users');
if (error) { /* handle */ }

// Resource pattern
class UsersResource extends Resource { route = '/users'; }
const usersResource = new UsersResource();
const { data: users } = await usersResource.list({ page: 1 });
```

## Key types

- `HttpResult<T>` — `{ data: T; error: null } | { data: null; error: HttpError }`
- `CancellablePromise<T>` — `Promise<T> & { cancel(reason?): void; signal: AbortSignal }`
- `HttpError` — status, body, isAborted, isTimeout, isNetwork, isNotFound(), isValidationError(), …
- `HttpConfig` — baseURL, auth, timeout, headers, cache, retry, putToPost, publishKey
- `RequestOptions` — params, headers, signal, cache, cacheKey, retry, throw, timeout, data
- `CacheDriver` — get / set / remove interface
- `ResourceService` — list / get / create / update / patch / delete / bulkDelete / publish

## Files

- `src/Http.ts` — main class
- `src/HttpError.ts` — error class
- `src/Resource.ts` — RESTful resource helper
- `src/cancellable.ts` — CancellablePromise factory
- `src/current-http.ts` — setCurrentHttp / getCurrentHttp
- `src/Http.types.ts` — all type definitions
- `src/utils/params.ts` — buildQueryString, appendParams
- `src/utils/body.ts` — prepareBody, parseBody
